title: mirabilis angustifolia
intro: Mirabilis angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved four o'clock, is a perennial plant native to North America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing alkaloids and glycosides that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mirabilis angustifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and other ailments.
